title: CitizensScale
description: A simple Spigot plugin that lets you resize Citizens NPCs using the [generic.scale] attribute. Supports Minecraft 1.20.5+.
body:
# CitizensScale

A simple Minecraft 1.21.1 plugin that allows you to scale [Citizens](https://citizensnpcs.co/) NPCs using the `generic.scale` attribute.

## Requirements

- Minecraft **1.20.5 or newer** (1.21.x recommended)
- [Spigot](https://www.spigotmc.org/) / [Paper](https://papermc.io/)
- [Citizens](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/citizens.13811/) 2.0 or newer (stable or dev build)

## Installation

1. Download the latest `CitizensScale.jar` from [Releases](https://github.com/derthert/CitizensScale/releases)
2. Place it in your server's `plugins/` folder
3. Restart the server

## Usage

First, select an NPC with Citizens:
```
/npc select
```

Then set the scale:
```
/npcscale <value>
```

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/npcscale 1.0` | Normal size |
| `/npcscale 2.0` | Twice the normal size |
| `/npcscale 0.5` | Half the normal size |
| `/npcscale reset` | Reset to default size |

> Scale value must be between `0` and `16.0`.

## Permissions

| Permission | Description | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `citizensscale.use` | Allows using `/npcscale` | `op` |

## Configuration

Scale values are saved automatically in `plugins/CitizensScale/config.yml`:

```yaml
npcs:
  5: 2.0   # NPC with ID 5 will be 2x normal size
  12: 0.5  # NPC with ID 12 will be half size
```
